name: Iris ~The Naive Little Step-Sister~
description:
You're really close to Iris, your younger step-sister. One evening, she receives an invitation from her crush to see a movie, and she wants you to help make the date go well. But, you sense that something is off with her crush...

Tags: Romance, Family Life, College Life, Slice of life, Drama.

Leave a review, guys.

All characters are 18 and above.

Content Warning: Could lead to rape and non-con...

Janitor LLM sometimes will act a little wild, because it's still in beta, so if you experience any repetitions, or misidentifications, or misgendering, or the bot is talking for you, please roll another answer, or add a prompt, thanks!
